description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight, light brown trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The trunk is relatively slender and branches out at various heights, supporting a network of thinner limbs that spread outward and upward. The leaves are distributed throughout the canopy, creating a layered effect with some visible gaps, allowing light to filter through. The branching pattern appears alternate, with branches emerging at different points along the trunk rather than in whorls or pairs. The base of the trunk is clean and free of visible roots, and the overall silhouette is upright and slightly conical. This tree would be commonly found in urban parks, along sidewalks, or as a street tree in neighborhoods.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight, light brown trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The branches spread outward and upward, creating a layered, upright silhouette.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from a slight angle, showing the trunk and a good spread of branches and leaves, with some gaps in the canopy visible.
description_view_1: This view is more head-on, emphasizing the symmetrical, upright shape of the tree and the even distribution of foliage.
description_view_2: The tree is viewed from another side, highlighting the branching structure and the moderate density of the canopy, with the trunk clearly visible.
description_view_3: This angle shows the tree with a slight lean, revealing more of the trunk and the layered arrangement of branches and leaves.
